criteria.notes: Plain HTML/CSS/JS project with no React or @amsterdam/design-system-react usage.
Custom CSS in styles.css with no evidence of --ams-* design tokens or Tailwind bridge.
No Amsterdam Design System Grid/Column layout used; plain CSS layout.
No ADS Header or Footer components; plain HTML header/footer elements at best.
Newsletter form uses plain HTML form elements, not ADS form components.
No external UI libraries used at all, so no banned libraries present.
Agent confirms all text in Dutch; file names and descriptions are consistently Dutch.
Content appears to be professional Dutch but cannot verify B1/Heldere Taal level without seeing full text.

Grep confirms exactly 5

tags per page across all three HTML files.
Transcript describes Zuidas-specific content about construction and developments but actual text unverifiable.
Professional style indicated by shared CSS and consistent structure, but tone unverifiable without full text.
Three separate HTML pages exist but use static file links, not client-side routing.
Newsletter signup form present on all three pages with JS validation via main.js.
Navigation menu links between all three pages confirmed by agent description.
